prompt: I want to build an app that audits your focus and attention span, then gives recommendations to improve it. Make it viral and valuable.
I have an idea for a product where you plug in your SaaS and agents do GTM tasks across Reddit, X, SEO, and Discord. Turn this into a spec.
Product idea: a personal taste profile that learns your aesthetic and helps with brands, outfits, apartments, and websites. Think through this with me.
I want to build something that helps freelancers package their skills into a paid offer. Write the MVP spec.
Feature idea for my writing app: daily challenge where users describe the same photo and AI compares the writing to the image. Make this concrete.
